texto: Silence allows people to put thoughts into words. Some people might need several minutes to put thoughts into words. Silence may indicate the person is reflecting on experiences, and he or she may just need time to process.
explicacao: Citação de Richard E. Dodge sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Silence allows people to put thoughts into words.
